title.en: Restrict Administrator Privileges to Dedicated Administrator Accounts

prose.en: Restrict administrator privileges to dedicated administrator accounts on enterprise assets. Conduct general computing activities, such as internet browsing, email, and productivity suite use, from the user's primary, non-privileged account.
Administrator privileges are restricted to dedicated administrator accounts on enterprise assets.
General computing activities, such as internet browsing, email, and productivity suite use, are conducted from the user's primary, non-privileged account.
